parameters.jsCode:
// 10-Slide Pro IELTS Tips Carousel Content
const slides = [
  {
    slide_number: "1",
    headline: "Ace IELTS: Your 4-Week Success Blueprint",
    subheadline: "Master all 4 sections with proven strategies",
    tip_1: "Listening \ud83c\udfa7",
    tip_2: "Reading \ud83d\udcd6",
    tip_3: "Speaking \ud83d\udde3\ufe0f",
    key_stat: "Writing \u270d\ufe0f"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "2",
    headline: "Listening Mastery",
    subheadline: "40 questions \u2022 30 minutes",
    tip_1: "Read questions BEFORE audio plays",
    tip_2: "Listen for signpost words (however, finally)",
    tip_3: "Don't pause on missed answers\u2014move forward",
    key_stat: "Pro tip: Practice with BBC podcasts daily"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "3",
    headline: "Reading Strategies",
    subheadline: "3 passages \u2022 60 minutes \u2022 40 questions",
    tip_1: "Skim first, read second\u201460 sec overview",
    tip_2: "Keywords are your GPS\u2014underline & match",
    tip_3: "TRUE/FALSE/NOT GIVEN: stick to text only",
    key_stat: "Pro tip: 20 min MAX per passage"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "4",
    headline: "Speaking Confidence",
    subheadline: "11-14 minutes \u2022 3 parts",
    tip_1: "Extend answers naturally\u20143-4 sentences",
    tip_2: "Use discourse markers (Well, Actually...)",
    tip_3: "Part 2: Use 1-min prep\u2014bullet points only",
    key_stat: "Pro tip: Record yourself daily"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "5",
    headline: "Writing Excellence",
    subheadline: "Task 1: 150 words \u2022 Task 2: 250 words",
    tip_1: "Task 1: Describe trends, not every data point",
    tip_2: "Task 2: Clear position + 2 body paragraphs",
    tip_3: "Spend 5 min planning, 35 min writing Task 2",
    key_stat: "Pro tip: Task 2 is worth DOUBLE\u2014prioritize it"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "6",
    headline: "Week-by-Week Study Plan",
    subheadline: "Your 4-week roadmap to success",
    tip_1: "Week 1: Diagnostic test + identify weak areas",
    tip_2: "Week 2: Focus on weakest 2 sections",
    tip_3: "Week 3: Full practice tests (timed)",
    key_stat: "Week 4: Review mistakes + rest before test"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "7",
    headline: "Practice Like a Pro",
    subheadline: "Quality beats quantity every time",
    tip_1: "Simulate real test conditions (no phone, timed)",
    tip_2: "3 focused hours > 6 distracted hours",
    tip_3: "Use official Cambridge IELTS books 15-18",
    key_stat: "Daily: 1 Listening test, 1 Reading passage, 10 min Speaking"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "8",
    headline: "Get Feedback That Works",
    subheadline: "Self-study has limits\u2014get expert eyes",
    tip_1: "Find a speaking partner or tutor",
    tip_2: "Review EVERY wrong answer\u2014understand WHY",
    tip_3: "Keep an error journal for patterns",
    key_stat: "Pro tip: Get 3 essays scored before test day"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "9",
    headline: "Test Day Pacing",
    subheadline: "Time kills more scores than difficulty",
    tip_1: "Listening: Use 10 min transfer time to review",
    tip_2: "Reading: 20 min per passage MAX",
    tip_3: "Writing: Task 1 = 20 min \u2022 Task 2 = 40 min",
    key_stat: "Pro tip: Wear a watch\u2014wall clocks may be behind you"
  },
  {
    slide_number: "10",
    headline: "Your Action Plan Starts Now",
    subheadline: "Don't wait for the perfect moment",
    tip_1: "Book your test 6-8 weeks out",
    tip_2: "Follow @BandLadder for daily IELTS tips",
    tip_3: "Download our free 4-week study planner",
    key_stat: "The deadline creates urgency\u2014commit today! \ud83d\ude80"
  }
];

return slides.map(slide => ({ json: slide }));

parameters.text:
=🎯 **IELTS Carousel Generated!**

{{ $json.total }} slides created successfully.

Slide URLs:
{{ $json.slides.map(s => `Slide ${s.slide}: ${s.image_url}`).join('\n') }}

parameters.content:
## IELTS Placid Carousel Generator

**Ready to use!**

Credentials pre-configured:
- Placid API: ✅
- Telegram Bot: ✅

**How to use:**
1. Import this workflow
2. Click Execute Workflow
3. 10 slides will be generated
4. URLs sent to Telegram
